---
title: "Research Introduction: Salary & Compensation Trends"
author: "Team C"
date: 2026-05-31
format: 
  html:
    bibliography: references.bib
    csl: csl/econometrica.csl
    toc: true
---

Thanks to AI-boosted productivity, even workers in high-wage roles that are heavily exposed to AI, saw their share of total employment grow by about 3% over five years @murray2025aiLaborMarket. 




## References
